the-inventory-not-tracked-snowboard: A dependable all-mountain board for riders who just want to get out and ride. Medium flex, a forgiving rocker profile, and a sintered base that holds speed on groomers and stays loose in soft snow. Available in a 156 cm length that suits most intermediate riders.
the-collection-snowboard-hydrogen: The lightest board in our Collection series. A full poplar core with carbon stringers keeps the swing weight low, so quick trees and tight moguls feel effortless. Directional twin shape, medium-soft flex, best between 152 and 158 cm rider sizing.
the-minimal-snowboard: Clean lines, no graphics, all business. The Minimal is a stiff directional charger built for carving hardpack at speed, with a camber-dominant profile and a full-length birch core. Suits confident intermediate to advanced riders.
the-compare-at-price-snowboard: Last season's flagship shape at a friendly price. Full camber, responsive mid-stiff flex, and a durable extruded base that shrugs off early-season rocks. An easy pick for riders who want performance without paying for this year's paint job.
the-out-of-stock-snowboard: Our most popular powder shape, with a tapered directional outline, setback stance, and generous nose rocker that floats without effort. Restocks sell through fast, so join the waitlist if it shows as unavailable.
selling-plans-ski-wax: All-temperature glide wax that works on skis and snowboards alike. Rub on, cork in, ride. One bar covers roughly ten full tune-ups, and the sample size is a great way to try it before committing to the full bar.
the-videographer-snowboard: Built for filmers and park laps. A true twin with a soft, buttery flex, pressable tips, and a base tuned for consistent speed into features. Rides switch exactly like it rides regular.
the-hidden-snowboard: A limited shop-exclusive deck we keep off the main wall. Hand-numbered topsheet, mid flex, and a versatile directional twin shape that handles the whole mountain. Ask us directly about current availability.
the-multi-location-snowboard: A do-everything daily driver stocked across all our warehouses for fast delivery. Medium flex, hybrid camber, and a wear-resistant extruded base make it a low-maintenance board for riders who log a lot of days.
the-3p-fulfilled-snowboard: Shipped directly from our fulfillment partner, usually within one business day. The board itself is a stable all-mountain cruiser with a gentle rocker profile that keeps turn initiation easy for progressing riders.
the-multi-managed-snowboard: A versatile mid-wide shape for riders with larger boots who are tired of toe drag. Medium-stiff flex, hybrid camber, and a 26.0 cm waist width in the 158 cm size.
the-collection-snowboard-oxygen: The freeride entry in our Collection series. A stiffer directional shape with a floaty nose, carbon-backed tail, and a fast sintered base for riders who point it when the snow gets deep.
the-collection-snowboard-liquid: The surf-inspired member of the Collection series. Loose, playful, and happiest in slush and spring laps, with a wide nose and a swallow-influenced tail that skims over soft snow.
